chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1711 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.6584/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.3035/2025 (C/A) 4. For hearing of main case 03-11-2025 M/s Ajeebullah Junejo and Badaruddin Indher, Advocates for the Respondents Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Qurban Ali Malano, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the grievance of the Petitioner has been redressed, therefore, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
